meta.name: Waterproof Push Buttons
meta.description: IP67 push buttons for outdoor and wet environments
meta.heroTitle: IP67 Push Buttons for Outdoor Installation
meta.heroDescription:
Low- and high-voltage push buttons with an IP67 rating operate in momentary or latching modes. Multifunction electrical signal configuration (SPC & DPC).

Surface-mounted housing. Multiple housing and button colour combinations with standard or custom marking options.

Intended for outdoor installations and wet environments requiring sealed signalling and control devices.

options.CL: #CL Custom labelling in Ukrainian or English (NON-RETURNABLE)
